note: Trace menu for the opt-in packet-trace panel section. Each entry points at a PacketTrace fixture (contract: scripts/estnet/PACKET-TRACE-CONTRACT.md). Adding a reviewed fixture + one entry here makes it selectable in the panel. Provenance, honesty badges and non-claims always render from the fixture itself, never from this file — a manifest entry cannot upgrade a trace's tier. stationA/stationB are MENU HINTS mirroring the fixture's own metadata endpoints (used only to pre-select a same-pair trace); the fixture stays the truth and verify:estnet fails on any hint that drifts from it or from the station registry.
